word: G2634 - κατακυριεύω - katakyrieúō - kat-ak-oo-ree-yoo'-o - Exercise dominion over

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Exercise dominion over
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to bring under one's power, to subject to oneself, to subdue, master
2. to hold in subjection, to be master of, exercise lordship over
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G2596 and G2961; to lord against, that is, control, subjugate: - exercise dominion over (lordship), be lord over, overcome.
